name: wasm-bindgen
description: Generate bindings between WebAssembly and JavaScript

options.description: Show help for wasm-bindgen
Show version for wasm-bindgen
Output directory

arg.name: directory
arg.description: Target directory to emit JS bindings, TS definitions, .wasm binaries, etc

options.description: Set a custom output filename (Without extension. Defaults to crate name)
What type of output to generate
Name of global to assign generated bindings to
Hint that JS should only be compatible with a browser
Output a TypeScript definition file (on by default)
Don't emit a *.d.ts file
Don't emit imports in generated JavaScript
Include otherwise-extraneous debug checks in output
Don't demangle Rust symbol names
Keep debug sections in wasm files
Remove the debugging `name` section of the file
Remove the telemetry `producers` section
Don't add WebAssembly fallback imports in generated JavaScript
Whether or not to use TextEncoder#encodeInto()
Deprecated, use `--target nodejs`
Deprecated, use `--target web`
Deprecated, use `--target no-modules`
Enable usage of the JS weak references proposal
Enable usage of WebAssembly reference types

args.name: input
args.description: File name to output the compiled binary bindings
